user.title: Configure Vehicle Tracker
user.description: Name your vehicle and select every driver's phone from the list of registered Companion App devices.

driver_names.title: Name each driver
driver_names.description: Confirm or change the display name for each driver. The phone's device name is pre-filled — just hit submit to accept it.

select_car.title: Select the vehicle's Bluetooth device
select_car.description: Choose the vehicle from the list of devices your phones have been paired with.

error.no_drivers: Select at least one driver phone.
error.bt_sensor_not_found: Could not find a Bluetooth Connection sensor for: {devices}. Enable the sensor in the Companion App (Settings → Companion App → Manage sensors → Bluetooth Connection) and try again.
error.no_paired_devices: None of the selected phones expose any paired Bluetooth devices yet. Pair the phone with the car once, then retry.

init.title: Update driver phones
init.description: Adjust which phones count as drivers for this vehicle.

driver_names.title: Update driver names
driver_names.description: Change the display name shown for each driver.

select_car.title: Update vehicle Bluetooth device
select_car.description: Pick the paired entry to monitor.

error.no_drivers: Select at least one driver phone.
error.bt_sensor_not_found: Could not find a Bluetooth Connection sensor for: {devices}. Enable it in the Companion App and try again.
error.no_paired_devices: None of the selected phones expose any paired Bluetooth devices yet.
